{{Quote|I just hope there are no surprises waiting for us like the last time I was here.|Han Solo|<ref name="Graveyard of Alderaan">''[[Graveyard of Alderaan]]''</ref>}}
'''The Graveyard''' was the leftover remnants of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] after [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|its destruction]] by the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]].

==History==
{{Quote|We've come out of hyperspace into a meteor shower. Some kind of asteroid collision. It's not on any of the charts. [...] Our position's correct, except no Alderaan.|Han Solo, discovering Alderaan's destruction|<ref name="Episode 4">{{Film|IV}}</ref>}}
When arriving at the previous location of the planet, the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], with [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] piloting, exited [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] in the thick of the newly created [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]].

Many Alderaanian Exiles performed a private ceremony called [[Return (Alderaanian)|the Returning]], wherein they would shoot capsules filled with gifts for their friends and family. Some Alderaanians, who called themselves the Guardians, took to patrolling the Graveyard to prevent pirates from stealing the capsules. These Alderaanians were held in rather high regard among the exiles.

[[File:Graveyard.jpg|thumb|left|250px|[[Battle in the Graveyard|Battle]] for the ''[[Another Chance]]'' in the Graveyard]]
In the months after the destruction of Alderaan, [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] agents often lay in wait for ships performing a Returning ritual. They boarded the ships and arrested the passengers and crew. The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] considered quarantining the Graveyard, as those Imperial actions were too risky for the Alliance.<ref name="SWG:RA">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=terminal|Rebel|Remembering Alderaan}}</ref>

The asteroid field was the site of a [[Battle of the Graveyard|brief battle]] in which [[Renegade Squadron/Legends|Renegade Squadron]] took a holocron that had survived Alderaan's destruction.

The remains of Alderaan's devastated [[Moon of Alderaan|moon]] were also scattered within the Graveyard.<ref name="Essential">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
